name: @kagent/llm-gateway
description: OpenAI-compatible HTTP gateway fronting multiple LLM backends with per-(model,backend) AIMD-tuned in-flight admission control. Adapted from archived/ai-gateway; AWS Lambda/CDK/DynamoDB surface dropped, runs as a long-running Node 22 http server in a Pod. BYO Postgres via DATABASE_URL.
author: Chris Knuteson <chris@ctkadvisors.net>
